entities.name: FALLOWING

entities.description: Specific timing and frequency of cutting back coppicing fallows

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE
entities.description: The water content of the soil

entities.name: MAIZE YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of maize measured in tonnes per hectare

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL TILLAGE
entities.description: Traditional soil cultivation method involving plowing

entities.name: NO TILLAGE
entities.description: A soil management system that avoids mechanical tillage

entities.description: A tree species used in coppicing fallow systems

entities.name: NATURAL FALLOW
entities.description: Land left to recover naturally without introduced species

entities.description: The portion of soil water that can be absorbed by plant roots
